content: Just as high school language arts teaching leverages structured written reflexion exercises to help students correct implicit reasoning gaps and deepen their understanding of complex problems, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow this scaffolded, language-teaching-derived framework to improve their generalization on open-ended reasoning tasks. This approach frames LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI-specific technique, but as a guided skill-building practice identical to how humans learn to reflect deliberately through formal education.
